verses.latin_vulgate: Veneruntque duo angeli Sodomam vespere, et sedente Lot in foribus civitatis. Qui cum vidisset eos, surrexit, et ivit obviam eis : adoravitque pronus in terram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יָּבֹ֠אוּ שְׁנֵ֨י הַמַּלְאָכִ֤ים סְדֹ֙מָה֙ בָּעֶ֔רֶב וְל֖וֹט יֹשֵׁ֣ב בְּשַֽׁעַר־סְדֹ֑ם וַיַּרְא־לוֹט֙ וַיָּ֣קׇם לִקְרָאתָ֔ם וַיִּשְׁתַּ֥חוּ אַפַּ֖יִם אָֽרְצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the two angels came to Sodom in the evening, and Lot was sitting in the gate of the city. And seeing them, he rose up and went to meet them: and worshipped prostrate to the ground.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaksi enkeliä tulivat ehtoona Sodomaan, ja Lot istui Sodoman portissa: ja kuin hän näki heidät, nousi hän heitä vastaan, ja kumarsi kasvoillensa maahan.
verses.king_james: And there came two angels to Sodom at even; and Lot sat in the gate of Sodom: and Lot seeing them rose up to meet them; and he bowed himself with his face toward the ground;

verses.latin_vulgate: et dixit : Obsecro, domini, declinate in domum pueri vestri, et manete ibi : lavate pedes vestros, et mane proficiscemini in viam vestram. Qui dixerunt : Minime, sed in platea manebimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֜אמֶר הִנֶּ֣ה נָּא־אֲדֹנַ֗י ס֣וּרוּ נָ֠א אֶל־בֵּ֨ית עַבְדְּכֶ֤ם וְלִ֙ינוּ֙ וְרַחֲצ֣וּ רַגְלֵיכֶ֔ם וְהִשְׁכַּמְתֶּ֖ם וַהֲלַכְתֶּ֣ם לְדַרְכְּכֶ֑ם וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ לֹּ֔א כִּ֥י בָרְח֖וֹב נָלִֽין׃
verses.douay_rheims: And said: I beseech you, my lords, turn in to the house of your servant, and lodge there: wash your feet, and in the morning you shall go on your way. And they said: No, but we will abide in the street.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: katso, minun Herrani, poiketkaat teidän palvelianne huoneeseen yöksi, ja antakaat pestä jalkanne, ja aamulla varhain noustuanne menette matkaan. Ja he sanoivat: ei suinkaan, vaan kadulla me yötä pidämme.
verses.king_james: And he said, Behold now, my lords, turn in, I pray you, into your servant’s house, and tarry all night, and wash your feet, and ye shall rise up early, and go on your ways. And they said, Nay; but we will abide in the street all night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Compulit illos oppido ut diverterent ad eum : ingressisque domum illius fecit convivium, et coxit azyma, et comederunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְצַר־בָּ֣ם מְאֹ֔ד וַיָּסֻ֣רוּ אֵלָ֔יו וַיָּבֹ֖אוּ אֶל־בֵּית֑וֹ וַיַּ֤עַשׂ לָהֶם֙ מִשְׁתֶּ֔ה וּמַצּ֥וֹת אָפָ֖ה וַיֹּאכֵֽלוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He pressed them very much to turn in unto him: and when they were come into his house, he made them a feast, and baked unleavened bread, and they ate:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän kovin vaati heitä, ja he poikkesivat hänen tykönsä, ja tulivat hänen huoneeseensa. Ja hän valmisti heille aterian, ja leipoi happamattomia leipiä, ja he söivät.
verses.king_james: And he pressed upon them greatly; and they turned in unto him, and entered into his house; and he made them a feast, and did bake unleavened bread, and they did eat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prius autem quam irent cubitum, viri civitatis vallaverunt domum a puero usque ad senem, omnis populus simul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טֶ֘רֶם֮ יִשְׁכָּ֒בוּ֒ וְאַנְשֵׁ֨י הָעִ֜יר אַנְשֵׁ֤י סְדֹם֙ נָסַ֣בּוּ עַל־הַבַּ֔יִת מִנַּ֖עַר וְעַד־זָקֵ֑ן כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם מִקָּצֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But before they went to bed, the men of the city beset the house, both young and old, all the people together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ennenkuin he levätä panivat, tulivat kaupungin miehet, Sodomalaiset, nuoret ja vanhat: kaikki kansa joka kulmalta, ja piirittivät huoneen.
verses.king_james: But before they lay down, the men of the city, even the men of Sodom, compassed the house round, both old and young, all the people from every quarter:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocaveruntque Lot, et dixerunt ei : Ubi sunt viri qui introierunt ad te nocte ? educ illos huc, ut cognoscamus eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרְא֤וּ אֶל־לוֹט֙ וַיֹּ֣אמְרוּ ל֔וֹ אַיֵּ֧ה הָאֲנָשִׁ֛ים אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֥אוּ אֵלֶ֖יךָ הַלָּ֑יְלָה הוֹצִיאֵ֣ם אֵלֵ֔ינוּ וְנֵדְעָ֖ה אֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they called Lot, and said to him: Where are the men that came in to thee at night? bring them out hither, that we may know them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja huusivat Lotin, ja sanoivat hänelle: kussa ovat ne miehet, jotka sinun tykös yöllä tulivat? tuo heitä meidän tykömme tutaksemme heitä.
verses.king_james: And they called unto Lot, and said unto him, Where are the men which came in to thee this night? bring them out unto us, that we may know them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressus ad eos Lot, post tergum occludens ostium, ait :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֧א אֲלֵהֶ֛ם ל֖וֹט הַפֶּ֑תְחָה וְהַדֶּ֖לֶת סָגַ֥ר אַחֲרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lot went out to them, and shut the door after him, and said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin Lot meni ulos heidän tykönsä oven eteen, ja sulki oven jälkeensä.
verses.king_james: And Lot went out at the door unto them, and shut the door after him,

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolite, quæso, fratres mei, nolite malum hoc facere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמַ֑ר אַל־נָ֥א אַחַ֖י תָּרֵֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Do not so, I beseech you, my brethren, do not commit this evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: älkäät te, rakkaat veljeni, tehkö niin pahoin.
verses.king_james: And said, I pray you, brethren, do not so wickedly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habeo duas filias, quæ necdum cognoverunt virum : educam eas ad vos, et abutimini eis sicut vobis placuerit, dummodo viris istis nihil mali faciatis, quia ingressi sunt sub umbra culminis mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה־נָ֨א לִ֜י שְׁתֵּ֣י בָנ֗וֹת אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹֽא־יָדְעוּ֙ אִ֔ישׁ אוֹצִֽיאָה־נָּ֤א אֶתְהֶן֙ אֲלֵיכֶ֔ם וַעֲשׂ֣וּ לָהֶ֔ן כַּטּ֖וֹב בְּעֵינֵיכֶ֑ם רַ֠ק לָֽאֲנָשִׁ֤ים הָאֵל֙ אַל־תַּעֲשׂ֣וּ דָבָ֔ר כִּֽי־עַל־כֵּ֥ן בָּ֖אוּ בְּצֵ֥ל קֹרָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have two daughters who, as yet, have not known man; I will bring them out to you, and abuse you them as it shall please you, so that you do no evil to these men, because they are come in under the shadow of my roof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, minulla on kaksi tytärtä, jotka ei vielä miehestä mitään tiedä: ne minä tuotan teille, tehkäät heille mitä te tahdotte: ainoastansa näille miehille älkäät mitään pahaa tehkö; sillä sentähden ovat he tulleet minun kattoni varjon ala.
verses.king_james: Behold now, I have two daughters which have not known man; let me, I pray you, bring them out unto you, and do ye to them as is good in your eyes: only unto these men do nothing; for therefore came they under the shadow of my roof.

verses.latin_vulgate: At illi dixerunt : Recede illuc. Et rursus : Ingressus es, inquiunt, ut advena ; numquid ut judices ? te ergo ipsum magis quam hos affligemus. Vimque faciebant Lot vehementissime : jamque prope erat ut effringerent fores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ ׀ גֶּשׁ־הָ֗לְאָה וַיֹּֽאמְרוּ֙ הָאֶחָ֤ד בָּֽא־לָגוּר֙ וַיִּשְׁפֹּ֣ט שָׁפ֔וֹט עַתָּ֕ה נָרַ֥ע לְךָ֖ מֵהֶ֑ם וַיִּפְצְר֨וּ בָאִ֤ישׁ בְּלוֹט֙ מְאֹ֔ד וַֽיִּגְּשׁ֖וּ לִשְׁבֹּ֥ר הַדָּֽלֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But they said: Get thee back thither. And again: Thou camest in, said they, as a stranger, was it to be a judge? therefore we will afflict thee more than them. And they pressed very violently upon Lot: and they were even at the point of breaking open the doors.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he sanoivat: tule tänne. Ja sanoivat: tuleeko joku muukalaiseksi, ja kuitenkin tahtoo kokonansa hallita? nyt, me teemme enemmän pahaa sinulle kuin heille: ja he tekivät suurella väkivallalla miehelle Lotille ylläkön, ja juoksivat ovea särkemään.
verses.king_james: And they said, Stand back. And they said again, This one fellow came in to sojourn, and he will needs be a judge: now will we deal worse with thee, than with them. And they pressed sore upon the man, even Lot, and came near to break the door.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ecce miserunt manum viri, et introduxerunt ad se Lot, clauseruntque ostium :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלְח֤וּ הָֽאֲנָשִׁים֙ אֶת־יָדָ֔ם וַיָּבִ֧יאוּ אֶת־ל֛וֹט אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם הַבָּ֑יְתָה וְאֶת־הַדֶּ֖לֶת סָגָֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And behold the men put out their hand, and drew in Lot unto them, and shut the door.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin miehet ojensivat kätensä ulos, ja tempasivat Lotin tykönsä huoneesen, ja paiskasivat oven kiinni.
verses.king_james: But the men put forth their hand, and pulled Lot into the house to them, and shut to the door.

verses.latin_vulgate: et eos, qui foris erant, percusserunt cæcitate a minimo usque ad maximum, ita ut ostium invenire non possent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶת־הָאֲנָשִׁ֞ים אֲשֶׁר־פֶּ֣תַח הַבַּ֗יִת הִכּוּ֙ בַּסַּנְוֵרִ֔ים מִקָּטֹ֖ן וְעַד־גָּד֑וֹל וַיִּלְא֖וּ לִמְצֹ֥א הַפָּֽתַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And them, that were without, they struck with blindness from the least to the greatest, so that they could not find the door.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet, kuin huoneen oven edessä olivat, löivät he sokeudella, pienet ja suuret, niin että he väsyivät ovea etseissänsä.
verses.king_james: And they smote the men that were at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great: so that they wearied themselves to find the door.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixerunt autem ad Lot : Habes hic quempiam tuorum ? generum, aut filios, aut filias, omnes, qui tui sunt, educ de urbe hac :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֨וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֜ים אֶל־ל֗וֹט עֹ֚ד מִֽי־לְךָ֣ פֹ֔ה חָתָן֙ וּבָנֶ֣יךָ וּבְנֹתֶ֔יךָ וְכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־לְךָ֖ בָּעִ֑יר הוֹצֵ֖א מִן־הַמָּקֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said to Lot: Hast thou here any of thine? son in law, or sons, or daughters, all that are thine bring them out of this city:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet sanoivat Lotille: onko sinulla vielä tässä joku? vävyjä, eli poikia taikka tyttäriä, eli kaikkia mitä sinulla on tässä kaupungissa? vie ne ulos tästä siasta.
verses.king_james: And the men said unto Lot, Hast thou here any besides? son in law, and thy sons, and thy daughters, and whatsoever thou hast in the city, bring them out of this place:

verses.latin_vulgate: delebimus enim locum istum, eo quod increverit clamor eorum coram Domino, qui misit nos ut perdamus illos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־מַשְׁחִתִ֣ים אֲנַ֔חְנוּ אֶת־הַמָּק֖וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה כִּֽי־גָדְלָ֤ה צַעֲקָתָם֙ אֶת־פְּנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיְשַׁלְּחֵ֥נוּ יְהֹוָ֖ה לְשַׁחֲתָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For we will destroy this place, because their cry is grown loud before the Lord, who hath sent us to destroy them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä me hukutamme tämän paikan: että heidän huutonsa on suuri Herran edessä, niin Herra lähetti meidät heitä hukuttamaan.
verses.king_james: For we will destroy this place, because the cry of them is waxen great before the face of the Lord; and the Lord hath sent us to destroy it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressus itaque Lot, locutus est ad generos suos qui accepturi erant filias ejus, et dixit : Surgite, egredimini de loco isto : quia delebit Dominus civitatem hanc. Et visus est eis quasi ludens loqui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֨א ל֜וֹט וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר ׀ אֶל־חֲתָנָ֣יו ׀ לֹקְחֵ֣י בְנֹתָ֗יו וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ ק֤וּמוּ צְּאוּ֙ מִן־הַמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה כִּֽי־מַשְׁחִ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־הָעִ֑יר וַיְהִ֥י כִמְצַחֵ֖ק בְּעֵינֵ֥י חֲתָנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Lot went out, and spoke to his sons in law that were to have his daughters, and said: Arise: get you out of this place, because the Lord will destroy this city. And he seemed to them to speak as it were in jest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Lot meni ulos ja puhutteli vävyjänsä, jotka piti saaman hänen tyttärensä, ja sanoi: nouskaat ja lähtekäät tästä siasta: sillä Herra hukuttaa tämän kaupungin: mutta hän oli niinkuin leikkiä tekevä hänen vävyinsä silmäin edessä.
verses.king_james: And Lot went out, and spake unto his sons in law, which married his daughters, and said, Up, get you out of this place; for the Lord will destroy this city. But he seemed as one that mocked unto his sons in law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque esset mane, cogebant eum angeli, dicentes : Surge, tolle uxorem tuam, et duas filias quas habes : ne et tu pariter pereas in scelere civitatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְמוֹ֙ הַשַּׁ֣חַר עָלָ֔ה וַיָּאִ֥יצוּ הַמַּלְאָכִ֖ים בְּל֣וֹט לֵאמֹ֑ר קוּם֩ קַ֨ח אֶֽת־אִשְׁתְּךָ֜ וְאֶת־שְׁתֵּ֤י בְנֹתֶ֙יךָ֙ הַנִּמְצָאֹ֔ת פֶּן־תִּסָּפֶ֖ה בַּעֲוֺ֥ן הָעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when it was morning, the angels pressed him, saying: Arise, take thy wife, and the two daughters that thou hast: lest thou also perish in the wickedness of the city.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska aamurusko kävi ylös, kiiruhtivat enkelit Lotin joutumaan, ja sanoivat: nouse, ota emäntäs, ja kaksi tytärtäs, jotka saapuvilla ovat, ettet sinä myös hukkuisi tämän kaupungin pahuudessa.
verses.king_james: And when the morning arose, then the angels hastened Lot, saying, Arise, take thy wife, and thy two daughters, which are here; lest thou be consumed in the iniquity of the city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dissimulante illo, apprehenderunt manum ejus, et manum uxoris, ac duarum filiarum ejus, eo quod parceret Dominus illi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּתְמַהְמָ֓הּ ׀ וַיַּחֲזִ֨יקוּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֜ים בְּיָד֣וֹ וּבְיַד־אִשְׁתּ֗וֹ וּבְיַד֙ שְׁתֵּ֣י בְנֹתָ֔יו בְּחֶמְלַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה עָלָ֑יו וַיֹּצִאֻ֥הוּ וַיַּנִּחֻ֖הוּ מִח֥וּץ לָעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And as he lingered, they took his hand, and the hand of his wife, and of his two daughters, because the Lord spared him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska hän viipyi, tarttuivat miehet hänen käteensä, ja hänen emäntänsä, ja hänen kahden tyttärensä käteen, sillä Herra tahtoi säästää heitä: ja taluttivat hänen ulos ja jättivät hänen ulkopuolelle kaupunkia.
verses.king_james: And while he lingered, the men laid hold upon his hand, and upon the hand of his wife, and upon the hand of his two daughters; the Lord being merciful unto him: and they brought him forth, and set him without the city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eduxeruntque eum, et posuerunt extra civitatem : ibique locuti sunt ad eum, dicentes : Salva animam tuam : noli respicere post tergum, nec stes in omni circa regione : sed in monte salvum te fac, ne et tu simul pereas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי֩ כְהוֹצִיאָ֨ם אֹתָ֜ם הַח֗וּצָה וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ הִמָּלֵ֣ט עַל־נַפְשֶׁ֔ךָ אַל־תַּבִּ֣יט אַחֲרֶ֔יךָ וְאַֽל־תַּעֲמֹ֖ד בְּכׇל־הַכִּכָּ֑ר הָהָ֥רָה הִמָּלֵ֖ט פֶּן־תִּסָּפֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they brought him forth, and set him without the city: and there they spoke to him, saying: Save thy life: look not back, neither stay thou in all the country about: but save thy self in the mountain, lest thou be also consumed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska he johdattivat heitä ulos, sanoivat he: pelasta sinun sielus, ja älä katsahda taakses, ja älä myös seisahda koko tälle lakeudelle; vaan turvaa sinuas vuorelle, ettes hukkuisi.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when they had brought them forth abroad, that he said, Escape for thy life; look not behind thee, neither stay thou in all the plain; escape to the mountain, lest thou be consumed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Lot ad eos : Quæso, domine mi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר ל֖וֹט אֲלֵהֶ֑ם אַל־נָ֖א אֲדֹנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Lot said to them: I beseech thee, my Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Lot sanoi heille: Ei Herra.
verses.king_james: And Lot said unto them, Oh, not so, my Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: quia invenit servus tuus gratiam coram te, et magnificasti misericordiam tuam quam fecisti mecum, ut salvares animam meam, nec possum in monte salvari, ne forte apprehendat me malum, et moriar :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה־נָ֠א מָצָ֨א עַבְדְּךָ֣ חֵן֮ בְּעֵינֶ֒יךָ֒ וַתַּגְדֵּ֣ל חַסְדְּךָ֗ אֲשֶׁ֤ר עָשִׂ֙יתָ֙ עִמָּדִ֔י לְהַחֲי֖וֹת אֶת־נַפְשִׁ֑י וְאָנֹכִ֗י לֹ֤א אוּכַל֙ לְהִמָּלֵ֣ט הָהָ֔רָה פֶּן־תִּדְבָּקַ֥נִי הָרָעָ֖ה וָמַֽתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because thy servant hath found grace before thee, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shewn to me, in saving my life, and I cannot escape to the mountain, lest some evil seize me, and I die.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, sinun palvelias on löytänyt armon sinun edessäs, sinä olet tehnyt sinun laupeutes suureksi, jonkas minulle osotit, pelastaakses minun sieluani: en taida minä pelastaa minuani vuorella, ettei minulle jotakuta pahaa tapahtuisi, ja kuolisin.
verses.king_james: Behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shewed unto me in saving my life; and I cannot escape to the mountain, lest some evil take me, and I die:

verses.latin_vulgate: est civitas hæc juxta, ad quam possum fugere, parva, et salvabor in ea : numquid non modica est, et vivet anima mea ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה־נָ֠א הָעִ֨יר הַזֹּ֧את קְרֹבָ֛ה לָנ֥וּס שָׁ֖מָּה וְהִ֣וא מִצְעָ֑ר אִמָּלְטָ֨ה נָּ֜א שָׁ֗מָּה הֲלֹ֥א מִצְעָ֛ר הִ֖וא וּתְחִ֥י נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: There is this city here at hand, to which I may flee, it is a little one, and I shall be saved in it: is it not a little one, and my soul shall live?
verses.finnish_biblia: Katsos, tuo kaupunki on läsnä, paeta sinne: ja hän on vähä: salli minua siellä pelastettaa: eikö hän ole vähäinen? että minun sieluni siellä elävänä pysyis.
verses.king_james: Behold now, this city is near to flee unto, and it is a little one: Oh, let me escape thither, (is it not a little one?) and my soul shall live.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad eum : Ecce etiam in hoc suscepi preces tuas, ut non subvertam urbem pro qua locutus es.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֔יו הִנֵּה֙ נָשָׂ֣אתִי פָנֶ֔יךָ גַּ֖ם לַדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֑ה לְבִלְתִּ֛י הׇפְכִּ֥י אֶת־הָעִ֖יר אֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבַּֽרְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to him: Behold also in this, I have heard thy prayers, not to destroy the city for which thou hast spoken.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi hän hänelle: katso, tässä asiassa olen minä myös sinun rukoukses päälle katsonut: etten minä kukista sitä kaupunkia, jostas puhuit.
verses.king_james: And he said unto him, See, I have accepted thee concerning this thing also, that I will not overthrow this city, for the which thou hast spoken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Festina, et salvare ibi : quia non potero facere quidquam donec ingrediaris illuc. Idcirco vocatum est nomen urbis illius Segor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַהֵר֙ הִמָּלֵ֣ט שָׁ֔מָּה כִּ֣י לֹ֤א אוּכַל֙ לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת דָּבָ֔ר עַד־בֹּאֲךָ֖ שָׁ֑מָּה עַל־כֵּ֛ן קָרָ֥א שֵׁם־הָעִ֖יר צֽוֹעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Make haste, and be saved there: because I cannot do any thing till thou go in thither. Therefore the name of that city was called Segor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Riennä, pelasta sinuas siellä: sillä en minä taida tehdä mitään, siihenasti ettäs sinne sisälle tulet. Sentähden kutsui hän sen kaupungin Zoar.
verses.king_james: Haste thee, escape thither; for I cannot do any thing till thou be come thither. Therefore the name of the city was called Zoar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sol egressus est super terram, et Lot ingressus est Segor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשֶּׁ֖מֶשׁ יָצָ֣א עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ וְל֖וֹט בָּ֥א צֹֽעֲרָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sun was risen upon the earth, and Lot entered into Segor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Aurinko oli noussut maan päälle, ja Lot tuli Zoariin sisälle.
verses.king_james: The sun was risen upon the earth when Lot entered into Zoar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Dominus pluit super Sodomam et Gomorrham sulphur et ignem a Domino de cælo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיהֹוָ֗ה הִמְטִ֧יר עַל־סְדֹ֛ם וְעַל־עֲמֹרָ֖ה גׇּפְרִ֣ית וָאֵ֑שׁ מֵאֵ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה מִן־הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord rained upon Sodom and Gomorrha brimstone and fire from the Lord out of heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra antoi sataa Sodoman ja Gomorran päälle tulikiveä ja tulta: Herralta taivaasta.
verses.king_james: Then the Lord rained upon Sodom and upon Gomorrah brimstone and fire from the Lord out of heaven;

verses.latin_vulgate: et subvertit civitates has, et omnem circa regionem, universos habitatores urbium, et cuncta terræ virentia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּהֲפֹךְ֙ אֶת־הֶעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔ל וְאֵ֖ת כׇּל־הַכִּכָּ֑ר וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הֶעָרִ֔ים וְצֶ֖מַח הָאֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he destroyed these cities, and all the country about, all the inhabitants of the cities, and all things that spring from the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kukisti ne kaupungit, ja kaiken sen lakeuden: niin myös kaikki niiden kaupunkein asuvaiset, ja maan kasvon.
verses.king_james: And he overthrew those cities, and all the plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Respiciensque uxor ejus post se, versa est in statuam salis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּבֵּ֥ט אִשְׁתּ֖וֹ מֵאַחֲרָ֑יו וַתְּהִ֖י נְצִ֥יב מֶֽלַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his wife looking behind her, was turned into a statue of salt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Lotin emäntä käänsi kasvonsa takaisin hänestä; ja muuttui suolapatsaaksi.
verses.king_james: But his wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abraham autem consurgens mane, ubi steterat prius cum Domino,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּשְׁכֵּ֥ם אַבְרָהָ֖ם בַּבֹּ֑קֶר אֶ֨ל־הַמָּק֔וֹם אֲשֶׁר־עָ֥מַד שָׁ֖ם אֶת־פְּנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abraham got up early in the morning, and in the place where he had stood before with the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Abraham nousi varhain aamulla, ja meni siihen paikkaan, kussa hän oli ennen seisonut Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And Abraham gat up early in the morning to the place where he stood before the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: intuitus est Sodomam et Gomorrham, et universam terram regionis illius : viditque ascendentem favillam de terra quasi fornacis fumum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּשְׁקֵ֗ף עַל־פְּנֵ֤י סְדֹם֙ וַעֲמֹרָ֔ה וְעַֽל־כׇּל־פְּנֵ֖י אֶ֣רֶץ הַכִּכָּ֑ר וַיַּ֗רְא וְהִנֵּ֤ה עָלָה֙ קִיטֹ֣ר הָאָ֔רֶץ כְּקִיטֹ֖ר הַכִּבְשָֽׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: He looked towards Sodom and Gomorrha, and the whole land of that country: and he saw the ashes rise up from the earth as the smoke of a furnace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja katsahti Sodomaa ja Gomorraa päin, ja kaiken sen maan lakeuteen; ja näki että savu nousi maasta niinkuin pätsin savu.
verses.king_james: And he looked toward Sodom and Gomorrah, and toward all the land of the plain, and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the country went up as the smoke of a furnace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum enim subverteret Deus civitates regionis illius, recordatus Abrahæ, liberavit Lot de subversione urbium in quibus habitaverat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י בְּשַׁחֵ֤ת אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־עָרֵ֣י הַכִּכָּ֔ר וַיִּזְכֹּ֥ר אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֑ם וַיְשַׁלַּ֤ח אֶת־לוֹט֙ מִתּ֣וֹךְ הַהֲפֵכָ֔ה בַּהֲפֹךְ֙ אֶת־הֶ֣עָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁר־יָשַׁ֥ב בָּהֵ֖ן לֽוֹט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now when God destroyed the cities of that country, remembering Abraham, he delivered Lot out of the destruction of the cities wherein he had dwelt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, koska Jumala kukisti sen lakeuden kaupungit, muisti Jumala Abrahamin: ja johdatti Lotin ulos hävityksen keskeltä, koska hän kukisti ne kaupungit, joissa Lot asui.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when God destroyed the cities of the plain, that God remembered Abraham, and sent Lot out of the midst of the overthrow, when he overthrew the cities in the which Lot dwelt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascenditque Lot de Segor, et mansit in monte, duæ quoque filiæ ejus cum eo (timuerat enim manere in Segor) et mansit in spelunca ipse, et duæ filiæ ejus cum eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֩עַל֩ ל֨וֹט מִצּ֜וֹעַר וַיֵּ֣שֶׁב בָּהָ֗ר וּשְׁתֵּ֤י בְנֹתָיו֙ עִמּ֔וֹ כִּ֥י יָרֵ֖א לָשֶׁ֣בֶת בְּצ֑וֹעַר וַיֵּ֙שֶׁב֙ בַּמְּעָרָ֔ה ה֖וּא וּשְׁתֵּ֥י בְנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Lot went up out of Segor, and abode in the mountain, and his two daughters with him (for he was afraid to stay in Segor) and he dwelt in a cave, he and his two daughters with him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Lot läksi Zoarista, ja asui vuorella, ja kaksi hänen tytärtänsä hänen kanssansa; sillä hän pelkäsi asua Zoarissa: ja oli luolassa ja kaksi hänen tytärtänsä hänen kanssansa.
verses.king_james: And Lot went up out of Zoar, and dwelt in the mountain, and his two daughters with him; for he feared to dwell in Zoar: and he dwelt in a cave, he and his two daughters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque major ad minorem : Pater noster senex est, et nullus virorum remansit in terra, qui possit ingredi ad nos juxta morem universæ terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֧אמֶר הַבְּכִירָ֛ה אֶל־הַצְּעִירָ֖ה אָבִ֣ינוּ זָקֵ֑ן וְאִ֨ישׁ אֵ֤ין בָּאָ֙רֶץ֙ לָב֣וֹא עָלֵ֔ינוּ כְּדֶ֖רֶךְ כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the elder said to the younger: Our father is old, and there is no man left on the earth, to come in unto us after the manner of the whole earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi vanhempi nuoremmalle: meidän isämme on vanha: eikä ole muuta miestä maan päällä, makaamaan meidän kanssamme, koko maan tavan jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And the firstborn said unto the younger, Our father is old, and there is not a man in the earth to come in unto us after the manner of all the earth:

verses.latin_vulgate: Veni, inebriemus eum vino, dormiamusque cum eo, ut servare possimus ex patre nostro semen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְכָ֨ה נַשְׁקֶ֧ה אֶת־אָבִ֛ינוּ יַ֖יִן וְנִשְׁכְּבָ֣ה עִמּ֑וֹ וּנְחַיֶּ֥ה מֵאָבִ֖ינוּ זָֽרַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Come, let us make him drunk with wine, and let us lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Käykäämme, juottakaamme meidän isämme viinalla, ja maatkaamme hänen kanssansa, herättääksemme isästämme siementä.
verses.king_james: Come, let us make our father drink wine, and we will lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederunt itaque patri suo bibere vinum nocte illa. Et ingressa est major, dormivitque cum patre ; at ille non sensit, nec quando accubuit filia, nec quando surrexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּשְׁקֶ֧יןָ אֶת־אֲבִיהֶ֛ן יַ֖יִן בַּלַּ֣יְלָה ה֑וּא וַתָּבֹ֤א הַבְּכִירָה֙ וַתִּשְׁכַּ֣ב אֶת־אָבִ֔יהָ וְלֹֽא־יָדַ֥ע בְּשִׁכְבָ֖הּ וּבְקוּׄמָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they made their father drink wine that night: and the elder went in, and lay with her father: but he perceived not, neither when his daughter lay down, nor when she rose up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he juottivat isänsä sinä yönä viinalla. Ja vanhempi tuli ja makasi isänsä kanssa, ja ei hän huomainnut koska hän levätä tuli, ja koska hän nousi.
verses.king_james: And they made their father drink wine that night: and the firstborn went in, and lay with her father; and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

verses.latin_vulgate: Altera quoque die dixit major ad minorem : Ecce dormivi heri cum patre meo, demus ei bibere vinum etiam hac nocte, et dormies cum eo, ut salvemus semen de patre nostro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ מִֽמׇּחֳרָ֔ת וַתֹּ֤אמֶר הַבְּכִירָה֙ אֶל־הַצְּעִירָ֔ה הֵן־שָׁכַ֥בְתִּי אֶ֖מֶשׁ אֶת־אָבִ֑י נַשְׁקֶ֨נּוּ יַ֜יִן גַּם־הַלַּ֗יְלָה וּבֹ֙אִי֙ שִׁכְבִ֣י עִמּ֔וֹ וּנְחַיֶּ֥ה מֵאָבִ֖ינוּ זָֽרַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the next day the elder said to the younger: Behold I lay last night with my father, let us make him drink wine also to night, and thou shalt lie with him, that we may save seed of our father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toisena päivänä sanoi vanhempi nuoremmalle: katso, minä makasin menneenä yönä isäni kanssa: juottakaamme häntä tänäkin yönä viinalla, ja mene sinä ja makaa hänen kanssansa, herättääksemme isästämme siementä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass on the morrow, that the firstborn said unto the younger, Behold, I lay yesternight with my father: let us make him drink wine this night also; and go thou in, and lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederunt etiam et illa nocte patri suo bibere vinum, ingressaque minor filia, dormivit cum eo : et ne tunc quidem sensit quando concubuerit, vel quando illa surrexerit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּשְׁקֶ֜יןָ גַּ֣ם בַּלַּ֧יְלָה הַה֛וּא אֶת־אֲבִיהֶ֖ן יָ֑יִן וַתָּ֤קׇם הַצְּעִירָה֙ וַתִּשְׁכַּ֣ב עִמּ֔וֹ וְלֹֽא־יָדַ֥ע בְּשִׁכְבָ֖הּ וּבְקֻמָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They made their father drink wine that night also, and the younger daughter went in, and lay with him: and neither then did he perceive when she lay down, nor when she rose up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he juottivat myös sinä yönä isänsä viinalla: ja nuorempi meni ja makasi hänen kanssansa, ja ei hän huomainnut koska hän levätä tuli, ja koska hän nousi.
verses.king_james: And they made their father drink wine that night also: and the younger arose, and lay with him; and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conceperunt ergo duæ filiæ Lot de patre suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽתַּהֲרֶ֛יןָ שְׁתֵּ֥י בְנֽוֹת־ל֖וֹט מֵאֲבִיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: So the two daughters of Lot were with child by their father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin molemmat Lotin tyttäret tulivat isästänsä raskaaksi.
verses.king_james: Thus were both the daughters of Lot with child by their father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peperitque major filium, et vocavit nomen ejus Moab : ipse est pater Moabitarum usque in præsentem diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֤לֶד הַבְּכִירָה֙ בֵּ֔ן וַתִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖וֹ מוֹאָ֑ב ה֥וּא אֲבִֽי־מוֹאָ֖ב עַד־הַיּֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the elder bore a son, and she called his name Moab: he is the father of the Moabites unto this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vanhempi synnytti pojan, ja kutsui hänen nimensä Moab: hänestä ovat Moabilaiset tulleet, hamaan tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And the firstborn bare a son, and called his name Moab: the same is the father of the Moabites unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Minor quoque peperit filium, et vocavit nomen ejus Ammon, id est, Filius populi mei : ipse est pater Ammonitarum usque hodie.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַצְּעִירָ֤ה גַם־הִוא֙ יָ֣לְדָה בֵּ֔ן וַתִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖וֹ בֶּן־עַמִּ֑י ה֛וּא אֲבִ֥י בְנֵֽי־עַמּ֖וֹן עַד־הַיּֽוֹם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The younger also bore a son, and she called his name Ammon; that is, the son of my people: he is the father of the Ammonites unto this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nuorempi myös synnytti pojan, ja kutsui hänen nimensä BenAmmi: hänestä tulivat Ammonin lapset, hamaan tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And the younger, she also bare a son, and called his name Ben–ammi: the same is the father of the children of Ammon unto this day.
